name: Kiro

form_factor.comment: Kiro spans IDE, CLI, Web, ACP-compatible IDE use, and automation. Per-form-factor links: CLI: https://kiro.dev/cli/; IDE: https://kiro.dev/downloads/; Web: https://app.kiro.dev/.

released_in.comment: Kiro entered public preview in 2025; CLI docs are now first-class.

latest_major_update.comment: June 2026 Kiro CLI docs refresh adds v1.26.0 custom-agent command changes, expanded model guidance, updated built-in tools, Kiro/Q Developer migration details, and refreshed powers/knowledge-management pages.

rules.comment: Steering files provide project/team instructions. Location: `.kiro/steering/` project steering files and global steering settings.

skills.comment: Kiro CLI references agent skills and Powers. Location: Kiro Powers use `POWER.md`; agent skills/knowledge are managed in Kiro project configuration.

hooks.comment: Smart hooks are documented as core CLI features.

mcp_servers.comment: Native MCP support in IDE and CLI. Location: `.kiro/mcp.json` / Kiro MCP configuration.

custom_commands.comment: CLI has slash commands and prompt/custom-agent workflows. Location: CLI slash commands are built in; custom agents/prompts are managed in Kiro custom-agent configuration.

goal_command.comment: Kiro CLI documents slash-style commands but no built-in `/goal` for persistent objectives.

subagents.comment: Built-in subagents for context gathering and parallel general-purpose tasks.

model_selection.comment: CLI /model displays and selects available models.

approval_mode.comment: Custom agents can use predefined tool permissions and approved plans.

sandbox_mode.comment: Permissioning is documented; explicit local filesystem/network sandbox modes are not clear.

continue.comment: kiro chat preserves project conversation history for continuing work.

non_interactive.comment: Headless --print examples are documented for CI/CD automation.

output_format.comment: Can export conversation state to JSON; no broad JSON stream mode found.

telemetry.comment: No telemetry control found in the docs reviewed.

hosted_agent.comment: Kiro Web exists, but the public CLI docs emphasize local terminal operation.

custom_model_provider.comment: Docs describe Kiro's model set/Auto agent, not arbitrary model providers.

pricing.comment: CLI and IDE share Kiro subscription pricing.

some_free_usage.comment: Kiro billing docs say new users start on the perpetual Kiro Free tier.

notes: Spec/steering-first agentic IDE plus CLI. Particularly strong on steering, hooks, custom agents, ACP-compatible IDEs, and CI automation.

transcripts.comment: Location: Kiro CLI uses directory-based conversation persistence; exact transcript directory is not specified in the public docs reviewed.

keyboard_shortcuts.comment: Research needed. Check official documentation for keybinding customization options.

theme_customization.comment: Research needed. Check for theme/appearance customization options.

auto_save.comment: Research needed. Check for auto-save or session persistence features.

debugging_output.comment: Research needed. Check for debug mode or verbose logging options.

context_window.comment: Research needed. Check for configurable context length or token limits.

code_formatting.comment: Research needed. Check for formatter/linter integration or auto-format options.

git_integration.comment: Research needed. Check for git command support or version control integration.

performance_mode.comment: Research needed. Check for caching, optimization, or resource management settings.

ui_customization.comment: Research needed. Check for UI layout, sidebar, or panel customization.
